channel.title: rally on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in rally on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: The Deaths of Coil & Rally S2Ep05
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: Coil has announced that they are shutting down. Interledger will still be going and we hope that someone will step in and take over where Coil left off.
